name: 1f. Dependency cleanup
description: Remove unused smui-theme from package.json. Run npm audit fix (without --force) for safe vulnerability fixes. Verify: npm audit shows reduced vuln count, pubgolf-devctrl check web still passes.

name: devctrl web commands + CI consistency
description: Add full web-app support to devctrl and make CI call devctrl. Single source of truth for all web operations. See plan: ~/.claude/plans/atomic-launching-naur.md

name: 1e. E2E smoke tests
description: Expand web-app/e2e-tests/index.test.ts with additional Playwright smoke tests: login page renders (/auth/login/), about page renders (/about/privacy/), no JS console errors on page load. Existing Playwright config already handles build+preview.

commit.message: test(e2e): add smoke tests for key pages (#601)

name: 1c. Unit tests for web-app helpers
description: Create unit tests for all helper modules. Files: phone.test.ts, scores.test.ts, formatters.test.ts, scoring-category.test.ts. Depends on 1b (phone helper extraction). Also update vite.config.ts to add environment: node. Delete placeholder src/index.test.ts. Verify: npm run test:unit -- --run passes.

commit.message: feat(web-app): add unit tests for helper modules (#600)

name: 1b. Extract cleanPhoneNumber helper
description: Move cleanPhoneNumber() from PlayerForm.svelte lines 48-55 to web-app/src/lib/helpers/phone.ts. Update PlayerForm.svelte to import from $lib/helpers/phone. Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web passes.

commit.message: feat(web-app): add unit tests for helper modules (#600)

name: F. Update CLAUDE.md + web-app docs
description: Update root CLAUDE.md: add new devctrl commands to table (build web, run web, test e2e api/web), add dex workflow section. Create or update web-app/CLAUDE.md with dev workflow docs. DEPENDS ON: A-E (lands last).

name: Wave 5: Build tooling modernization
description: Cleanup wave. ESLint 8→9 (flat config), typescript-eslint 5→8, eslint-plugin-svelte3→svelte, Prettier 2→3, prettier-plugin-svelte 3, Vite 5→6+, postcss-load-config 4→6, Tailwind/sass/autoprefixer minor bumps. Needs its own planning session.

name: 1d. CI integration for web unit tests
description: Add 'Run Web Unit Tests' step to web_app_build_and_check job in .github/workflows/ci.yaml. Run npm run test:unit -- --run after npm ci, before lint. Uses npm directly (not devctrl) since devctrl isn't available in CI.

commit.message: feat(web-app): add unit tests for helper modules (#600)

name: 1a. Add test web subcommand to devctrl
description: Add testWebCmd to tools/lib/cmd/test.go. Handler runs 'npm run test:unit -- --run' with Dir: web-app. Register in init(), update bare testCmd to also run web tests. Follow checkWeb pattern from check.go. Verify: pubgolf-devctrl test web --dry-run, go test ./tools/...

name: A. build web command
description: Create tools/lib/cmd/build.go with build and build web commands. build web runs ./node_modules/.bin/vite build in web-app/. Follow checkWeb pattern. Independent — no dependencies.

name: C. run web command
description: Add run web to tools/lib/cmd/run.go. Starts vite dev server (port 5173) via Runner.Start(). Fetches env from Doppler project web-app, config dev. Uses envProvider.Env() pattern. Complement to run api. Independent — no dependencies.

commit.message: feat(devctrl): add run web subcommand for SvelteKit dev server (#605)

name: E. CI uses devctrl for web
description: Modify .github/workflows/ci.yaml web_app_build_and_check job. Add Go setup (actions/setup-go), replace raw npm commands with go run ./tools/cmd/pubgolf-devctrl {install web, test web, check web, build web}. DEPENDS ON: A (build web).

name: B. test e2e restructure
description: Restructure test e2e in tools/lib/cmd/test.go. Current test e2e becomes test e2e api (move existing runE2ETest logic). Add test e2e web (Playwright: ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test in web-app/). Wire bare test e2e to run both sequentially. Independent — no dependencies.

commit.message: feat(devctrl): restructure test e2e into api/web subcommands (#604)

name: D. run (bare) full-stack redesign
description: Redesign bare run command in tools/lib/cmd/run.go. Full-stack: 1) DB via dockerRun(), 2) build web via buildWeb(), 3) start vite preview (4173) via Runner.Start(), 4) start API with PUBGOLF_WEB_APP_UPSTREAM_HOST=http://localhost:4173. DEPENDS ON: A (build web) and C (run web pattern).

name: Web App Modernization
description: Full modernization of the web-app: add test coverage, fix 25 npm audit vulnerabilities (10 high), and upgrade all major dependencies. Svelte 3→5, SvelteKit 1→2, Vite 4→6+, Skeleton UI 1→4, ESLint 9, Prettier 3. See plan: ~/.claude/plans/atomic-launching-naur.md

name: Wave 2: Merge safe dependabot PRs
description: After Wave 1 lands, merge 6 low-risk dependabot PRs: #577 (flatted), #566 (minimatch), #561 (js-yaml), #564 (immutable), #563 (rollup), #559 (playwright). Close superseded PRs: #553, #556, #558, #567, #568, #569, #565.
result: All target deps already at desired versions via lockfile regen. #561 merged. #577/#566/#564/#563/#559 closed (already updated). Superseded PRs #553/#556/#558/#565/#567/#568/#569 closed.

name: Wave 3: SvelteKit 1→2 + Svelte 3→4
description: Security-critical migration. Use npx sv migrate sveltekit-2 and npx svelte-migrate svelte-4. Bump adapter-static 2→3, adapter-auto, Vite 4→5, svelte-check 3→4, Vitest to Vite-5-compatible version. Resolves all high-severity CVEs (devalue, undici, cookie, SvelteKit XSS). Needs its own planning session.

name: Wave 4: Svelte 4→5 + Skeleton UI replacement
description: Incremental Svelte 5 migration (compat mode first, then file-by-file runes), add E2E test coverage for admin pages (mocked + real API), replace Skeleton UI v1 with custom Tailwind components. See plan: ~/.claude/plans/tranquil-doodling-yao.md

name: Wave 1: Test foundation + CI
description: Establish test safety net before any dependency upgrades. Add devctrl test web command, extract testable helpers, write unit tests, configure CI, add e2e smoke tests, remove unused deps.

name: Svelte 5 compat mode upgrade
description:
Bump deps to Svelte 5 with backward compatibility — zero syntax changes, all existing code works in compat mode.

package.json changes:
- svelte: ^4.0.0 → ^5.0.0
- @sveltejs/kit: ^2.0.0 → ^2.16.0 (latest SK2 with Svelte 5 support)
- @sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte: ^3.0.0 → ^5.0.0
- svelte-check: ^4.0.0 → ^4.1.0
- Check lucide-svelte@0.503.0 Svelte 5 compat, upgrade if needed
- Remove overrides block for vite-plugin-svelte

Watch for: ComponentProps import changes, ComponentType usage, context='module' diagnostics, Skeleton v1 peer dep warnings (acceptable).

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web, test e2e web.

name: Playwright mocked API test infrastructure
description:
Add E2E test framework for authenticated admin pages using Playwright route interception. No real server needed.

Infrastructure (e2e-tests/helpers/):
- mock-api.ts: set web_admin_user_token cookie, mock /web-api/auth/generate-api-token → {token}, mock Connect-RPC routes /rpc/api.v1.AdminService/* with JSON responses
- fixtures.ts: typed factories for Player, Stage, StageScore, AdjustmentTemplate, Venue protobuf-compatible JSON

Test coverage (e2e-tests/admin/):
- Auth guard: unauth visit to /admin/nyc-2025/scores/ redirects to /auth/login?redirect=...
- Scores: table renders with mock data, player/venue names display correctly
- Score entry: open Enter Score modal → fill form → submit → verify createStageScore RPC payload
- Score verify: click Verify → verify updateStageScore RPC called
- Score delete: click Delete → confirm dialog → confirm → verify deleteStageScore RPC
- Adjustments: load page, Create Adjustment modal, submit, verify createAdjustmentTemplate RPC
- Adjustment visibility: toggle hide/show, verify confirm dialog + updateAdjustmentTemplate RPC
- Players: Register New Player modal with name/phone/league, verify createPlayer RPC
- Player edit: open edit modal, change league, verify updatePlayer RPC
- Schedule: renders stage table with venues/durations/rules
- Schedule edit: edit modal, change venue/duration, verify updateStage RPC
- Drawer nav: mobile viewport → menu click → drawer opens → nav link → navigates + closes
- Toast: mock RPC error → verify toast with error message
- Error banner: mock auth failure → error banner with Retry button works

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl test e2e web.

name: devctrl seed command with named seeds
description:
Add pubgolf-devctrl seed <name> command that populates a database with a named seed dataset. Supports local and remote environments.

Command structure:
- pubgolf-devctrl seed <name> — run named seed against local dev DB
- pubgolf-devctrl seed <name> --env <environment> — run against non-local env (e.g. staging, used by iOS app for dev)
- pubgolf-devctrl seed --list — show available seed names

Named seeds:
- admin-test: 1 event (nyc-test), 8 venues, 8 stages, 15 players across 3 scoring categories, 30 scores (mix verified/unverified), 5 adjustment templates (global + venue-specific, visible + hidden)
- Future seeds as Go functions in tools/lib/cmd/seed/

Non-local env support:
- Local: connect directly to Docker dev DB (reuse existing devctrl DB connection)
- Remote: use Connect-RPC AdminService API, authenticate with env's admin token from Doppler

Implementation:
- tools/lib/cmd/seed.go — cobra command registration
- tools/lib/cmd/seed/ — seed definition directory
- tools/lib/cmd/seed/admin_test_seed.go — the admin-test seed function
- Idempotent: upsert semantics or delete-and-recreate

Add to CLAUDE.md command table.

name: E2E tests with real API server + seed data
description:
Playwright integration tests against real API with seeded data. Highest-fidelity tests.

Setup:
- Separate Playwright project config (integration profile) — expects running server, no auto-start
- Before suite: pubgolf-devctrl seed admin-test
- Login with real test credentials from Doppler dev config

Test coverage mirrors mocked tests but exercises real API:
- Full auth flow: login page → enter password → redirect to admin
- Score CRUD: enter score → appears in table → verify score → delete score → disappears
- Player CRUD: register player with name/phone/league → appears in list → edit league → verify update
- Adjustment management: create template → verify in table → toggle visibility → verify state change
- Data consistency: created data appears in lists, deleted data disappears, refreshing shows current state

Wire into: pubgolf-devctrl test e2e web --integration or separate devctrl command.

name: Migrate simple leaf components to Svelte 5 runes
description:
Migrate trivial components with no complex state or events. 5 files.

Files and changes:
- SetTitle.svelte: export let title → let { title } = $props()
- SiteFooter.svelte: $$restProps.class → let { class: className, ...rest } = $props(), use className in template
- NoDataCard.svelte: export let → $props(), bare on:click forwarding → onclick callback prop, callers pass onclick handler
- AboutNav.svelte: no props, just template — no changes needed
- AdminNav.svelte: no props, just template — no changes needed

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web.

name: Migrate interactive components to Svelte 5 runes
description:
Migrate components with events, reactive declarations, and store subscriptions. 5 files.

Files and changes:
- ErrorBanner.svelte: createEventDispatcher → ondismiss: ((error: DisplayError) => void) | undefined callback prop. context='module' → module attribute. export type stays via module script.
- RefreshHeader.svelte: export let → $props(). $: setState(loadingStatus) → $effect(() => setState(loadingStatus)). Named slot 'filters' → {#snippet filters} or children.
- SidebarNav.svelte: export let → $props(). on:click on <a> → onclick. $drawerStore subscription stays (Skeleton compat).
- Sidebar.svelte: $drawerStore subscription stays for now.
- AuthFooter.svelte: on:click → onclick. $drawerStore/$toastStore subscriptions stay.

Note: Store subscriptions ($drawerStore, $toastStore) stay because Skeleton stores are still in use — replaced in Skeleton removal tasks.

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web.

name: Migrate layout files to Svelte 5 runes
description:
Migrate 3 layout files. Slots become snippets, svelte:fragment becomes snippet rendering, event handlers become callbacks. 3 files.

Files and changes:
- routes/+layout.svelte: <slot /> → {@render children()}. Skeleton Drawer/Modal/Toast component usage stays for now.
- routes/about/+layout.svelte: <svelte:fragment slot='sidebarLeft'> → AppShell receives snippet props. on:click → onclick on menu button. <slot /> → {@render children()}.
- routes/admin/[eventKey]/+layout.svelte: Same slot→snippet pattern. on:click → onclick on menu button. on:dismiss on ErrorBanner → ondismiss callback prop. <slot /> → {@render children()}.

Note: AppShell/AppBar Skeleton components stay — they accept snippets via their own slot mechanism which Svelte 5 compat handles. Full AppShell replacement happens in Skeleton replacement tasks.

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web, test e2e web.

name: Migrate modal forms to Svelte 5 runes
description:
Most complex Svelte 5 migration. 4 files with reactive blocks, store interactions, and module-level type exports.

Files and changes:
- PlayerForm.svelte: export let → $props(). $: normalizedPhoneNumber = cleanPhoneNumber(phoneNumber) → let normalizedPhoneNumber = $derived(cleanPhoneNumber(phoneNumber)). context='module' → module. on:click → onclick. on:dismiss on ErrorBanner → ondismiss callback.
- ScoreForm.svelte (most complex): export let → $props(). $: { if (!formInit && score) {...} } → $effect for one-time init logic. $: formData.adjustments = [...] → $derived or $effect for computed adjustments. $: formData.score!.value = scoreValue → $effect. on:focus → onfocus, on:click → onclick.
- StageForm.svelte: export let → $props(). context='module' → module. on:click → onclick.
- AdjustmentTemplateForm.svelte: let venueSpecific = writable(...) → let venueSpecific = $state(!!template?.data?.stageId). $venueSpecific → venueSpecific in template. context='module' → module.

Note: modalStore.close(), $modalStore[0]?.response(), ComponentProps<Modal> patterns stay — replaced in Skeleton Modal replacement task.

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web.

name: Migrate page components to Svelte 5 runes
description:
Migrate all route +page.svelte files to Svelte 5 runes. 7+ files.

Files and changes:
- admin/[eventKey]/scores/+page.svelte: let filterUnverifiedOnly = writable(false) → let filterUnverifiedOnly = $state(false). $: { $filterUnverifiedOnly; refreshData(); } → $effect(() => { filterUnverifiedOnly; refreshData(); }). All on:click → onclick, on:dismiss → ondismiss callback. modalStore.trigger stays.
- admin/[eventKey]/players/+page.svelte: on:click → onclick, on:dismiss → ondismiss. modalStore stays.
- admin/[eventKey]/adjustments/+page.svelte: Same pattern. on:click → onclick.
- admin/[eventKey]/schedule/+page.svelte: Same pattern.
- auth/login/+page.svelte: on:submit → onsubmit on form (needs |preventDefault handling), on:click → onclick, on:dismiss → ondismiss.
- event/[eventKey]/+page.svelte: Minimal — may not need changes.
- about/contact/+page.svelte, about/privacy/+page.svelte: Static content, likely no changes.

Note: modalStore.trigger() patterns stay for Skeleton compat — replaced in Skeleton Modal system task.

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web, test e2e web.

name: Skeleton replacement: CSS compat layer + custom layout
description:
Create CSS that preserves Skeleton utility classes and a custom layout component replacing AppShell/AppBar.

New files:
- src/styles/skeleton-compat.css: Tailwind @apply equivalents for all Skeleton classes used in the app:
  .card, .card-header, .card-footer (bg, rounded, shadow, padding)
  .btn, .btn-icon, .btn-sm, .btn-lg (sizing, padding, font)
  .variant-filled, .variant-filled-primary, .variant-filled-secondary, .variant-filled-error, .variant-ringed-secondary (colors + hover)
  .label, .input, .select, .textarea, .checkbox (form element styles)
  .table, .table-hover, .table-container, .table-cell-fit (table styles)
  .alert, .alert-message, .alert-actions (alert layout)
  .badge-icon, .list-nav (misc)
  .w-modal (modal width)
  Extract equivalent styles from Skeleton v1 source CSS.

- src/lib/components/AppLayout.svelte: Flexbox shell with Svelte 5 snippet props: {#snippet header}, {#snippet sidebarLeft}, {#snippet pageHeader}, {#snippet pageFooter}, {@render children()}. Full-height layout matching AppShell behavior.

Modified files:
- app.postcss: Replace Skeleton tokens (font-heading-token → font-sans/serif, --theme-rounded-container → custom prop, --color-primary-500 → Tailwind primary, --on-surface → Tailwind color)
- routes/+layout.svelte: Replace Skeleton CSS imports with skeleton-compat.css import
- All 3 layout files: Replace <AppShell>/<AppBar> with <AppLayout> + custom header markup using <nav> and flex layout

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, build web, test e2e web. Visual comparison of pages before/after.

name: Skeleton replacement: Modal system
description:
Custom modal/dialog system replacing Skeleton's Modal component + modalStore.

New files:
- src/lib/components/modal/Modal.svelte: Overlay container. Props: open (boolean), onclose callback. Handles: Escape key closes, backdrop click closes. Renders content via {@render children()} snippet. Applies w-modal width, card styling, shadow.

- src/lib/components/modal/modal-controller.svelte.ts: Svelte 5 rune-based state controller replacing modalStore.
  - let currentModal = $state<ModalState | null>(null)
  - triggerComponent(component, props, onResponse): opens a component-based modal. Component receives onclose + onsubmit props instead of parent: ComponentProps<Modal>.
  - triggerConfirm(title, body, onResponse): opens a simple confirm/cancel dialog.
  - close(): closes current modal.
  - Provided via Svelte context API (setContext/getContext).

- src/lib/components/modal/ConfirmDialog.svelte: Simple confirm/cancel dialog for delete confirmations. Title, body text, Cancel/Confirm buttons.

Modified files:
- routes/+layout.svelte: Remove Skeleton <Modal/>, mount modal provider component.
- 4 modal forms (PlayerForm, ScoreForm, StageForm, AdjustmentTemplateForm): Remove parent: ComponentProps<Modal> prop. Use modal controller context for close/response. Button styling via skeleton-compat CSS classes directly.
- 4 admin pages (scores, players, adjustments, schedule): Replace modalStore.trigger({type:'component', component:{ref,props}, response}) with controller.triggerComponent(Component, props, onResponse). Replace modalStore.trigger({type:'confirm',...}) with controller.triggerConfirm(title, body, onResponse).

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, build web, test e2e web. Manually test modal open/close/submit flows.

name: Skeleton replacement: Drawer + Toast
description:
Custom drawer and toast components replacing Skeleton's Drawer/Toast + drawerStore/toastStore.

Drawer — new files:
- src/lib/components/drawer/Drawer.svelte: Sliding panel from left with semi-transparent backdrop. Props: open, onclose, width (default 'w-11/12 max-w-sm'). CSS transition for slide-in/out. Content via {@render children()} snippet.
- src/lib/components/drawer/drawer-controller.svelte.ts: Svelte 5 state controller replacing drawerStore.
  - let currentId = $state<string | null>(null)
  - open(id: string): sets currentId
  - close(): sets currentId to null
  - Provided via Svelte context API.

Toast — new files:
- src/lib/components/toast/Toast.svelte: Fixed-position notification (bottom-right or top-right). Props: message, background (variant class), duration (auto-dismiss timer, default 5s). Fade-in/out animation.
- src/lib/components/toast/toast-controller.svelte.ts: Svelte 5 state controller replacing toastStore.
  - let toasts = $state<ToastItem[]>([])
  - trigger({ message, background }): adds toast, starts auto-dismiss timer
  - Queue management: max 3 visible, FIFO.
  - Provided via context API.

Modified files:
- routes/+layout.svelte: Remove Skeleton <Drawer/> and <Toast/>, mount drawer + toast providers.
- Sidebar.svelte: Replace $drawerStore.id === 'admin-nav' with drawer controller context.
- SidebarNav.svelte: Replace drawerStore.close() with drawer controller.
- AuthFooter.svelte: Replace toastStore.trigger() with toast controller, drawerStore with drawer controller.
- about/+layout.svelte: Replace drawerStore.open({id:'about-nav'}) with drawer controller.
- admin/[eventKey]/+layout.svelte: Replace drawerStore.open({id:'admin-nav'}) with drawer controller.
- admin/[eventKey]/scores/+page.svelte: Replace toastStore.trigger() with toast controller.
- admin/[eventKey]/adjustments/+page.svelte: Replace toastStore.trigger() with toast controller.

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, build web, test e2e web. Test drawer on mobile viewport, toast on error scenarios.

name: Remove Skeleton dependency
description:
Final cleanup — all Skeleton imports have been replaced by prior tasks.

Changes:
- package.json: Remove @skeletonlabs/skeleton from devDependencies
- tailwind.config.cjs: Remove Skeleton content path (require.resolve line) and Skeleton plugin (...require('@skeletonlabs/skeleton/tailwind/skeleton.cjs')())
- app.html: Remove data-theme='skeleton' from <body>
- web-app/CLAUDE.md: Update to remove 'Skeleton UI 1.x' reference, note custom components

Pre-check: grep -r '@skeletonlabs/skeleton' web-app/src/ should return zero results (all imports replaced).

Verify: pubgolf-devctrl check web, test web, build web, test e2e web. npm ls @skeletonlabs/skeleton should show not installed.
